Author: grimgrum (soft-target fork by Sushii-dev)
Name: Action Camera (Soft Target)
Punchline: GW2-style action camera for FFXIV — soft-target variant.
Description: Fork of grimgrum's Action Camera. The auto-target cone writes MouseOverTarget (yellow outline) and SoftTarget (red ring) each frame instead of clobbering the hard target. A manually-cycled hard target (e.g. MMB) always wins and persists; the cone fills the soft slot otherwise. Pairs with ReAction stacks using either 'Field Target' or 'Soft Target' priority. Hold or toggle a configurable key to capture the mouse, freely rotate the camera, and auto-face your character toward the camera.
